title: Photorealistic Lifestyle/Editorial Photo Shoot Prompt with Identity Preservation
description: A highly specific, photorealistic image generation prompt in French, instructing the AI to create a lifestyle/editorial photo shoot scene in a street café setting using a provided reference photo. The prompt strictly mandates 100% preservation of the subject's identity (face, proportions, features,
content: Créez une séance photo lifestyle/éditoriale photoréaliste de type « flash décontracté dans un café de rue », en utilisant la photo d'une personne fournie comme référence. L'apparence de la personne doit être strictement identique à celle du modèle : visage parfaitement reconnaissable (100 %), mêmes proportions et géométrie du visage, même forme des yeux, du nez et des lèvres, même teint, même âge, même coiffure et même implantation des cheveux. Ne modifiez pas le visage, ne l'« améliorez » pas et ne changez pas le genre. Le décor est fixe : un café/espace lounge en soirée (intérieur), murs beiges, grande fenêtre donnant sur la nuit noire, comptoir de bar en bois le long de la fenêtre, mobilier simple : chaises en métal noir, tables en bois. À gauche, une grande fleur d'intérieur en pot. Aucun panneau, logo ou texte lisible sur les murs ou les fenêtres. La composition est fixe : un plan vertical en pied, la caméra à hauteur de poitrine, la personne se tenant légèrement à droite du centre. Au premier plan, à gauche, une chaise en métal noir est posée sur un sac à dos blanc orné d'un imprimé graphique noir (sans texte lisible). L'arrière-plan est légèrement flou, mettant ainsi l'accent sur le personnage. L'éclairage est fixe : un flash puissant (flash direct de l'appareil photo), des ombres marquées sur le mur et le sol, un style photo « spam », comme celui d'un appareil photo compact ou d'un iPhone. La tenue vestimentaire est également fixe : un t-shirt blanc oversize sans logo ni inscription, un pantalon noir large, des baskets blanches à rayures noires (style rétro), une ceinture, une chaîne ou des clés à la taille (sans marque) sont acceptables. La pose est fixe : la personne se tient debout, détendue, à côté de la chaise, le corps légèrement tourné de trois quarts ; la main droite est levée et touche la tête/les cheveux (paume sur la nuque), la main gauche est baissée près de la hanche. Les jambes : une jambe est tendue, l'autre légèrement fléchie, le talon levé, créant une posture de mannequin. La tête est tournée sur le côté (à gauche), le regard n'est pas fixé sur l'objectif, l'expression est calme et assurée, sans sourire. Qualité/Style : ultra-réaliste, netteté du visage, légère profondeur de champ, teint naturel, grain léger, aucune retouche, aspect brillant. Important : anatomie rigoureusement correcte : deux bras, deux jambes, cinq doigts, aucune difformité ni membre surnuméraire.p

The background is clean and minimalistic, light gray in color, softly blurred to keep full focus on the subject. The composition is centered and balanced, with sharp focus on the eyes and shallow depth of field. title: Cinematic 360-Degree Orbital Tracking Shot Video Prompt
description: A complex prompt for generating a 10-second cinematic video using Nano Banana Pro and Kling 3.0, featuring a 360-degree rotating orbital tracking shot around a central character in a power pose, emphasizing technical details for motion consistency and spatial anchoring.
content:
Cinematic 360-degree rotating orbital tracking shot. The camera maintains an low-angle "worm's-eye view" while rotating in a full circle around the central character. The character remains in a powerful, wide-stanced power pose, holding the massive rusted chain-wrapped spear vertically. As the camera orbits, the futuristic white circular laboratory environment rotates seamlessly in the background. High-fidelity textures on the black leather tactical boots, the puffy grey jacket, and the weathered metal of the spear. Photorealistic lighting with subtle lens flares from the overhead circular lights. Consistent character features, maintaining the beanie and silver necklaces throughout the rotation. Smooth, stabilized 10-second motion path. 8k resolution, highly detailed, IMAX aesthetic.

Logic and Composition Breakdown
Spatial Anchoring
For a 360 spin to work on a website hero section, the axis of rotation must be the spear and the character’s midline. By specifying "orbital tracking shot," you instruct the AI to move the camera on a circular track rather than just spinning the image, which prevents "melting" or warping of the character's limbs.

Consistency Mapping
Primary Anchor: The rusted, chain-wrapped spear. Its central position in the frame acts as the pivot point.

Secondary Anchor: The oversized tactical boots. Their placement at the bottom corners of the frame must remain grounded on the white grid floor to prevent "floating" during the spin.

Environment: The circular ceiling lights provide a natural geometric guide for the AI to calculate the rotation vector.

Technical Parameters for Kling 3.0 Pro
Motion Sensitivity: Set to 5 or 6. High enough to complete the rotation, but low enough to avoid limb deformation.

Prompt Weighting: Focus on "Rotation" and "Orbital" to ensure the camera completes a full circle within the 10-second duration.

Negative Prompt
Distorted facial features, morphing limbs, spear changing shape, boots losing detail, background flickering, jerky camera movement, zoom-in, zoom-out, character walking, changing clothes, blurry textures, low resolution, 2D anime style, cartoonish, floating objects, extra fingers, messy hair.

title: Photorealistic Street Photo Prompt: Vintage Fashion Girl in Shibuya

PROMPT:
Ultra high-resolution photorealistic street photo at dusk (blue hour) in Shibuya, Tokyo, at the famous scramble crossing. Neon signs and city lights glowing in the background with strong bokeh, crowded pedestrians with slight motion blur, cinematic urban atmosphere. A young Japanese woman (around early 20s), small face, natural youthful features, dark brown to black medium bob haircut with straight bangs. She is looking downward with a quiet, slightly melancholic expression, eyes cast down, calm and reserved mood. Full-body shot in a vertical composition, standing near the curb on the sidewalk, relaxed posture with one hand in a pocket, shoulders slightly tucked in.

Outfit: red and beige varsity jacket with white striped ribbing, plain white T-shirt underneath. Thick mustard-yellow knitted scarf wrapped around her neck with visible fringes. Oversized faded wide-leg blue jeans with heavy distressing and large rips around the knees. Red-and-black basketball-style sneakers, black laces. Crosswalk white stripes visible, evening warm light on the pavement, no rain.

Camera & look: 35mm–50mm street photography, f/1.8–f/2.8, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the subject’s face and upper body, background softly blurred. Natural skin texture (no heavy beauty filter), subtle pores, realistic hair strands. Cinematic color grading (warm highlights, slightly cool shadows), HDR, crisp detail, low noise, 8K quality, vertical 9:16, full body in frame, no cropping.

low quality, blurry, out of focus, bad anatomy, deformed body, distorted face, uneven eyes, extra fingers, extra limbs, unnatural joints, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, AI-looking shine, heavy noise, grain, text, watermark, logo, readable sign text, cropped body, out of frame, overexposed, blown highlights, crushed blacks, anime style, illustration, cartoon

title: Hyper-Realistic Product Render with Holochrome Gradients
description: A highly technical prompt for generating a hyper-realistic 8K product render. It specifies extreme detail in lighting (hard edge lighting, rim light, chiaroscuro), materials (brushed aluminum, mirror chrome), and composition (centered, levitating in a pure black void), while strictly forbidding comm
content:
Create a hyper-realistic 8K product render of {argument name="product name" default="[INSERT YOUR PRODUCT HERE]"}

The subject should be perfectly centered and levitating in mid-air, floating in a void with no surface, platform, stand, or floor. Show the full product with zero cropping and visible margins on all sides. 
Use a dynamic macro 45-degree hero angle.

The background must be solid pure black (#000000).

Lighting should feature hard edge lighting with strong rim light highlights. Use a high-contrast chiaroscuro look with thin chromatic aberration along metallic edges. Include reflective caustic light hits and an oily iridescent sheen on polished surfaces.

Color palette:

Background: #000000
Metal highlights: #E0E0E0
Iridescent accents: #4169E1, #FFD700, #FF4500

Materials and textures should combine micro-brushed sandblasted aluminum with mirror-finish chrome. Add subtle prismatic dispersion and thin-film interference along metal curves. Include fine film grain for tactile realism.

Do not include any props or additional objects. 
No light boxes, umbrellas, softboxes, pedestals, cables, tripods, or hands. 
No cropped edges or cut-off parts. 
No text, logos, watermarks, blur, bokeh background, dust, or scratches.

Style reference: Industrial Design meets luxury hardware photography.

Lines: clean, smooth, medium-thickness outlines, clear closed shapes, no broken lines, no sketchiness.
Shading: no gray colors, no shadows, no gradients — outlines only.
Details: simplified but accurate, preserving the recognizability of key objects and expressions, removing unnecessary background.
Faces: expressive, friendly, slightly rounded features, kid-friendly, maintaining likeness.
Background: simplified interior or environmental elements, minimalistic yet readable.
Composition: centered, balanced, with comfortable margins for printing.
Technical requirements:
– clean black lines on a white background
– high contrast
– printable A4 / US Letter format
– suitable for coloring with pencils or markers
No color, no textures, no realism, no photo effects, no hatching, no cross-hatching.

title: Fashion Vlog Video Generation (Nano Banana Pro + Veo 3.1)
description: A detailed prompt used to generate a fashion vlog video. The image was first generated using Nano Banana Pro, and then converted into a video using Google Veo 3.1. The prompt focuses on cinematic quality, realistic lighting, and natural expression, culminating in a short vlog moment.
content:
正面を向いた動画風のショットを作成。カメラは顔の高さで固定、被写体の真正面に配置。被写体は姿勢と構図から座っていることが示されている。

構図はシンプルで安定しており、劇的なアングルや目立つカメラの動きはない。照明は[UGCスタイルのショットを考慮した現実的な照明を追加]から。顔ははっきり見える。

被写体の表情は穏やかでリラックスしており、自然なほのかな微笑みを浮かべている。まるでカメラに向かってVlogを語り始めようとしているかのようだ。画質は夜間の屋内で撮影された動画（高画質）を反映しており、フィルター、美化効果、人工的なシャープネス処理は一切施されていない。

空間は個人的な空間として感じられる。ボケはカメラの限界によるもので、人工的な被写界深度効果ではない。全体的な雰囲気は温かく、明るく、親密で、被写体が話し始める直前のリアルなVlogの瞬間を思わせる。

女性のセリフは、「今日のファッションは【ファッションの特徴を追加】がポイントです！」と優しい口調で話しながら服を触っている。最後に笑顔になる。

BGM：Vlog風のファッションの雰囲気に合った音が心地よく流れている。
author: 空想写真家

title: Dominance portrait generation prompt (Gemini - Thinking mode)
description: An extremely detailed, structured prompt for Nano Banana (Gemini - Thinking mode) designed to create a 'dominance portrait' of an uploaded reference character seated on a divine throne. The prompt emphasizes strict likeness integrity, engineering the throne from the character's design language, and
content:
Create a dominance portrait of the uploaded reference character seated on a divine throne that feels engineered from their own world and design language.

The camera observes the ruler from a partially obstructed viewpoint, as if the viewer is looking through the monumental structure of the throne itself.

Likeness Integrity (HIGHEST PRIORITY)

Maintain exact:

• Head-to-body proportions

• Eye shape, spacing, stylization

• Surface materials

• Silhouette and structural design

Do not humanize.

Do not reinterpret anatomy.

Do not add unintended accessories.

Perspective exaggeration must come only from camera placement, not structural redesign.

Identity always wins.

Throne Adaptation System (UNIVERSAL LOGIC)

The throne must feel like a structural extension of the character’s design universe and must feel divine.

Rules:

Extract design language from the character:

Dominant material logic

Geometric language

Color

World energy

Translate, never copy.

Echo shapes subtly in silhouette

Reflect material family, not exact textures

Use tonal harmony, not color duplication

Patterns may appear in architecture, structure, or ornamentation but must remain subordinate to the character’s identity.

Camera & Perspective

• Camera positioned slightly below the throne platform but offset laterally

• 16–20mm wide cinematic lens

• The throne structure partially obstructs the frame

• Large architectural element of the throne occupies the foreground edge of the frame

• Character visible through the throne’s structural opening or between its elements

• Horizon slightly tilted 5–8 degrees

• The viewer feels as if witnessing the ruler from behind the architecture of power

Foreground elements must feel massive and close to the lens, framing the character like a monumental gateway.

Composition

• The character sits centered within the throne structure but partially framed by its geometry

• Throne architecture creates a natural visual tunnel toward the character

• Foreground throne elements remain slightly out of focus

• Character remains the focal authority within the frame

Lighting

• Singular vertical divine beam descending from above the throne

• Volumetric haze revealing light shafts

• Strong rim light outlining the character silhouette

• Controlled specular spikes along throne edges

• Foreground throne elements remain darker, creating contrast against the illuminated ruler

Depth & Focus

• Eyes in absolute clarity

• Character face and upper torso remain sharp

• Foreground throne structure slightly blurred from proximity to lens

• Background dissolves into atmospheric layers

The image must feel layered in depth:

foreground architecture → seated ruler → atmospheric background.

Background

• Vast negative space above the throne

• Atmospheric tension

• Light beam

title: Sherlock Holmes Ornate Cupboard Diorama Prompt
description: A complex, structured prompt template for Nano Banana 2 to generate a hyper-realistic render of an ornate cupboard diorama. The diorama must contain three shelves, each depicting a scene from 'Adventures of Sherlock Holmes'. The prompt uses variable guides for materials, style, lighting, and camera
content:
Variable Guide
1. OVERALL_DIORAMA_THEME = Scenes from Adventures of Sherlock Holmes by Arthur Conan Doyle, in the order in which they are presented in the book
2. CUPBOARD_BASE_MATERIAL = 
3. CUPBOARD_LINING_MATERIAL = 
4. RACK_MATERIAL = 
5. ORNAMENTATION_STYLE = [e.g., Gothic carved wood, Art Deco brass, Elven interlaced vines]
6. ART_STYLE = Hyper-Realistic Render
7. TOP_SHELF_SCENE = [Describe specific actions of miniature figures defining the scene]
8. MIDDLE_SHELF_SCENE = [Describe specific actions of miniature figures defining the scene]
9. BOTTOM_SHELF_SCENE = [Describe specific actions of miniature figures defining the scene]
10. LIGHTING = 
11. CAMERA_ANGLE = A straight-on, front-facing view, captured from a moderately high angle looking distinctly downward.
12. ASPECT_RATIO = 3:4

Generation Directives
(Note: If any variable is left blank, intelligently infer the most appropriate detail based on the OVERALL_DIORAMA_THEME)

Directive 1: Framing & Composition (Highest Priority)
A direct, front-facing photograph captured from CAMERA_ANGLE. The composition must perfectly center the open display structure, looking down at a distinct angle into the shelves to clearly reveal the floor plates and top-down depth of the miniature objects within the dioramas, while ensuring the exterior side panels remain completely hidden. The entire free-standing structure must be completely visible with negative space around it against a simple background. The aspect ratio is 3:4.

Directive 2: The Main Structure (Strict Constraints)
Render the image in the style of ART_STYLE. The central object is a highly detailed, permanently open-front curio display structure. It must not possess doors, hinges, or door frames of any kind. The exterior is constructed from CUPBOARD_BASE_MATERIAL and detailed with ORNAMENTATION_STYLE. The interior back wall is lined with CUPBOARD_LINING_MATERIAL, and the individual shelves are made of RACK_MATERIAL.

Directive 3: The Miniature Dioramas & Figures
The structure houses a cohesive miniature world divided across three shelves, adhering to the OVERALL_DIORAMA_THEME. Crucially, each shelf must contain miniature figures engaged in a specific narrative action.
* Top Shelf: Miniature figures are depicted [TOP_SHELF_SCENE].
* Middle Shelf: Miniature figures are depicted [MIDDLE_SHELF_SCENE].
* Bottom Shelf: Miniature figures are depicted [BOTTOM_SHELF_SCENE].
Ensure the scale clearly reads as miniature dioramas housed within a furniture piece.

Directive 4: Atmosphere & Lighting
The scene is illuminated by LIGHTING. The lighting should cast appropriate micro-shadows within each shelf to emphasize the depth, the figures, and the miniature scale of the dioramas.
